\tzpentry{ID11430}{Signed Energy Inversion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The TZP energy channel is modeled as equal magnitude and opposite polarity relative to ordinary projection energy.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
E=mc^2,\qquad E_{\mathrm{TZP}}=-E,\qquad I_E=\operatorname{sign}(E_{\mathrm{TZP}}/E)=-1
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{d854b680-848b-542e-a562-d7fd1c628b44}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-11430-s4s5-mix}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.gen-ph}.
